description_long: This is a multi-strand necklace composed of numerous small, light blue beads strung together in parallel rows, creating a layered and textured appearance. The strands are closely aligned, giving the necklace a dense and intricate look, while the beads themselves appear to be uniformly shaped and polished. The necklace is displayed on a white, matte-finished bust stand, which accentuates the delicate color and craftsmanship of the piece. At the back, the strands are gathered and tied, suggesting an adjustable closure that allows for a custom fit around the neck. The overall design is elegant and understated, with a focus on the repetition and rhythm of the beadwork. This piece would be suitable for both casual and formal urban settings, adding a touch of color and sophistication to the wearer's attire.
description: A multi-strand, light blue beaded necklace with a layered, textured design and an adjustable tie closure, displayed on a white bust stand. The necklace features closely aligned, polished beads for an elegant and intricate look.
description_view_0: Front view shows the full layered arrangement of light blue beads draping symmetrically across the bust.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the depth and curvature of the necklace, as well as the way the strands gather at the back.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the tied closure and the way the strands are secured together at the back of the neck.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the necklace's profile and the layered beadwork draping along the bust.
